name: Of Guards And Thieves
short_description: Of Guards and Thieves is a multiplayer stealth game in which high-powered guards face off against fast and elusive thieves in a contest of wits. Outsmarting the enemy and shooting your way through to the goal are equally valid strategies. Simple rules, emergent gameplay and high replayability.
detailed_description:
Of Guards and Thieves is a multiplayer stealth game in which high-powered guards face off against fast and elusive thieves in a contest of wits. Outsmarting the enemy and shooting your way through to the goal are equally valid strategies. A game with simple rules, emergent gameplay and high replayability, Of Guards and Thieves is sure to be a showstopper in your gaming collection!

KEY FEATURES:

- Asymmetric Stealth multiplayer tactical action.
- Easy to play, hard to master!
- Lots of Operators with unique Gadgets, Weapons, and play style.
- Huge selection of Competitive and Fun game modes.
- Innovative Dynamic Lighting System.
- Interactive Environment.
- Rich and Deep Tactical Teamplay!
- Customizable Operators and Weapon's esthetics.
- Map Workshop with thousand of user-made maps to explore!
- Dedicated server - Enjoy the game on our 24/7 dedicated servers, bigger game, less lag, more fun!
- Private lobby hosting to have fun with your friends.
- Leveling System with experience points and 80 unlockable levels.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Japanese, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Swedish, Turkish, Portuguese - Portugal, Arabic, Czech, Dutch, Finnish, Hungarian, Korean, Norwegian, Spanish - Latin America, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Thai, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
*languages with full audio support
